systems.system_notes: Portfolio-level public anchor for Arthrex Latarjet instrumentation and fixation workflow resources.

components.component_notes: Official Arthrex portfolio sources describe the broader Latarjet instrumentation and fixation workflow family.

unresolved_items.raw_text: This is a portfolio-level row rather than a single fixation system, so no dedicated tray is asserted in this pass.
